description_long: This is an electric guitar with a double-cutaway body design, finished in a deep, rich mahogany color with a visible wood grain texture. The body features two prominent, stylized red horn-like accents on either side of the upper bout, giving it a striking and aggressive appearance. The front face displays two humbucker pickups, a black pickguard, and three control knobs, typical of rock-oriented electric guitars. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard and dot inlays, leading up to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side and a classic truss rod cover. The back of the guitar is plain, with the same mahogany finish and a black electronics cavity cover. The overall construction suggests a solid wood body with metal hardware and plastic components for the pickguard and knobs.
description: A deep mahogany electric guitar with double cutaways, red horn accents, dual humbuckers, and a classic six-tuner headstock.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the guitar's slim body, neck, and the protruding red horn accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the double-cutaway body, red horns, dual humbuckers, black pickguard, and control knobs.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness and the red horn accents, with some hardware visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain mahogany back, black electronics cavity cover, and the back of the headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic 3+3 tuner layout, black truss rod cover, no visible logo, rounded top
